title: Portfolio
description: Designed and built a personal portfolio website to highlight skills, completed courses, and projects. Showcases skills in web development, UI/UX design, and content organisation. Serves as a professional platform for recruiters and collaborators to learn about work and achievements.

title: Student Dashboard
description: Provides an easy way to manage student records. Allows users to add, view, and delete student details efficiently. Designed to improve organization and simplify basic record operations.

title: Banking Application Prototype
description: Developed a banking app prototype with user-friendly navigation and responsive design. Created wireframes and interactive prototypes to visualize account management and transaction flows. Focused on clean visual design principles to enhance the overall user experience.
